# Vendored ansi_up Browser Global

- Source package: `ansi_up@6.0.6` from the Node 24 no-publish lock baseline.
- Source file: `ansi_up.js`, wrapped to expose `window.AnsiUp` and `window.rc16AnsiUp`.
- License: MIT.

This preserves the existing Rancher UI log ANSI conversion behavior while removing `ember-browserify` and `npm:ansi_up` from the application build path.
